address."}}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"acceptMigration(address)":{"details":"msg.sender must be the exact newAddress stored in the pending migration      for oldAddress. On acceptance: accrues earnings, copies full Worker state      to the new address, deletes the old entry, and clears the pending migration.","params":{"oldAddress":"The current worker address that proposed the migration."}},"acceptTerms()":{"details":"Fractional settlement is applied for any partial interval remainder under      the old interval before new terms take effect. lastAccruedAt is reset to now      because every earned second has been explicitly settled before this point."},"addWorker(address,uint8,uint256,uint256,string)":{"params":{"amountPerIntervalWei":"Amount in wei per interval.","customIntervalSeconds":"Custom interval when timeline is Custom.","metadata":"Worker metadata blob/string.","timeline":"Chosen payroll timeline type.","workerAddr":"Worker wallet address."}},"cancelProposal(address)":{"details":"Restores worker.active and resets lastAccruedAt. Safe because worker was paused      since proposeTerms \u2014 no unaccrued remainder has accumulated during this period.","params":{"workerAddr":"Worker wallet address."}},"claim()":{"returns":{"claimedAmount":"Amount paid in wei."}},"claimTo(address)":{"params":{"recipient":"Recipient address."},"returns":{"claimedAmount":"Amount paid in wei."}},"claimable(address)":{"params":{"workerAddr":"Worker wallet address."},"returns":{"_0":"Current claimable wei balance."}},"constructor":{"params":{"initialOwner":"Owner address."}},"expireProposal(address)":{"details":"Callable by anyone \u2014 either party can trigger expiry. Executes the same      rejection branching logic as rejectTerms, respecting terminateOnReject.      This prevents either party from being held in limbo indefinitely.","params":{"workerAddr":"Worker wallet address whose proposal has expired."}},"fundTreasury()":{"details":"Callable by operators only."},"grantTriggerPayment(address,uint256)":{"params":{"amountWei":"Amount to grant in wei.","workerAddr":"Worker wallet address."}},"proposeMigration(address)":{"details":"Only the registered worker (msg.sender) can initiate. Stores the      proposed new address as a pending migration. The new address must      separately call acceptMigration() to prove control and complete transfer.","params":{"newAddress":"The destination address that will receive full worker state."}},"proposeTerms(address,uint8,uint256,uint256,bool)":{"details":"Settles current earnings via _accrue(), pauses the worker, and stores the      proposal with an expiry deadline. Worker must accept or reject before expiry.      Rate and interval are the core employment terms \u2014 workers must consent to changes.","params":{"amountPerIntervalWei":"Proposed new payment amount in wei per interval.","customIntervalSeconds":"Custom interval \u2014 only used when timeline is Custom.","terminateOnReject":"If true, rejection or expiry triggers full settlement and termination.","timeline":"Proposed new timeline type.","workerAddr":"Worker wallet address."}},"rejectTerms()":{"details":"If terminateOnReject=true: fractional settlement is applied, worker is permanently      deactivated, accrued balance remains claimable. If terminateOnReject=false: old      terms are restored and worker resumes. In both cases lastAccruedAt is reset to now      because _accrue() was called at proposeTerms time \u2014 no remainder has accumulated      since the worker was paused throughout the proposal period."},"setAdmin(address,bool)":{"params":{"admin":"Admin address.","enabled":"Whether the admin is enabled."}},"setLowTreasuryThreshold(uint256)":{"details":"Only callable by owner. Set to 0 to disable low treasury warnings.","params":{"thresholdSeconds":"New threshold in seconds."}},"setProposalWindow(uint256)":{"details":"Operator-settable at runtime. Only affects proposals made after this call.","params":{"durationSeconds":"New window duration in seconds."}},"setWorkerStatus(address,bool)":{"params":{"active":"New active status.","workerAddr":"Worker wallet address."}},"transferOwnership(address)":{"params":{"newOwner":"New owner address."}},"treasuryRunway()":{"details":"Pure view \u2014 safe to call permissionlessly by any worker or frontend at zero gas cost.      Skips inactive workers and Trigger-timeline workers since they do not continuously drain.","returns":{"estimatedRunwaySeconds":"How many seconds the current treasury balance can sustain payroll.         Returns type(uint256).max if no workers are actively accruing (division by zero guard).","totalRatePerSecond":"Sum of all active workers' wei drain per second."}},"updateWorkerInterval(address,uint8,uint256)":{"details":"This is the sensitive update path. Steps:      1. _accrue() settles all complete intervals under the old terms.      2. Fractional settlement pays out the partial interval pro-rata under the old rate.      3. lastAccruedAt is reset to now \u2014 safe because every earned second is settled.      4. New timeline and intervalSeconds are applied clean from this point forward.      Fractional settlement is skipped if worker is inactive, on Trigger timeline,      or if the interval is not actually changing.","params":{"customIntervalSeconds":"Custom interval duration \u2014 only used when timeline is Custom.","timeline":"New timeline type.","workerAddr":"Worker wallet address."}},"updateWorkerMetadata(address,string)":{"details":"Pure metadata change \u2014 no accrual state is touched.","params":{"metadata":"New metadata string.","workerAddr":"Worker wallet address."}},"updateWorkerRate(address,uint256)":{"details":"Settles whole intervals via _accrue() first. lastAccruedAt is intentionally      not touched \u2014 the interval is unchanged so _accrue() already preserved the      remainder correctly and the new rate takes effect from the next interval boundary.","params":{"amountPerIntervalWei":"New payment amount in wei per interval.","workerAddr":"Worker wallet address."}},"withdrawExcess(address,uint256)":{"details":"Steps: (1) accrue all active non-Trigger workers to settle pending earnings so the      balance check reflects reality, (2) compute total drain rate and minimum reserve,      (3) revert if treasury is already underwater or withdrawal would breach the reserve,      (4) transfer and emit. Callable by operators only.","params":{"amountWei":"Amount to withdraw in wei.","recipient":"Address to receive the withdrawn ETH."}},"workerRunway(address)":{"details":"A worker's fair share of the balance is proportional to what fraction of the total      drain rate they represent. This gives a personally meaningful runway figure rather      than a global one that ignores how many other workers are competing for the same funds.","params":{"workerAddr":"Worker wallet address to query."},"returns":{"estimatedRunwaySeconds":"Seconds of funding remaining for this specific worker.         Returns 0 if worker does not exist, is inactive, or is on Trigger timeline.         Returns type(uint256).max if worker is active but total drain rate is zero."}}},"stateVariables":{"lowTreasuryThresholdSeconds":{"details":"Settable by owner. Defaults to 7 days."},"workerList":{"details":"Required because mappings are not iterable. Used by treasury runway calculations."}},"title":"StreamWagePayroll","version":1},"userdoc":{"errors":{"InsufficientTreasury()":[{"notice":"Reverts when treasury cannot satisfy payout."}],"InvalidAmount()":[{"notice":"Reverts when amount is zero where non-zero is required."}],"InvalidConfiguration()":[{"notice":"Reverts on invalid parameter combinations."}],"InvalidWorker()":[{"notice":"Reverts when worker does not exist."}],"MigrationAlreadyPending()":[{"notice":"Reverts when a migration is already pending for this acceptMigration(address).details: msg.sender must be the exact newAddress stored in the pending migration      for oldAddress. On acceptance: accrues earnings, copies full Worker state      to the new address, deletes the old entry, and clears the pending migration.

params.oldAddress: The current worker address that proposed the migration.

acceptTerms().details: Fractional settlement is applied for any partial interval remainder under      the old interval before new terms take effect. lastAccruedAt is reset to now      because every earned second has been explicitly settled before this point.

params.customIntervalSeconds: Custom interval when timeline is Custom.

cancelProposal(address).details: Restores worker.active and resets lastAccruedAt. Safe because worker was paused      since proposeTerms — no unaccrued remainder has accumulated during this period.

expireProposal(address).details: Callable by anyone — either party can trigger expiry. Executes the same      rejection branching logic as rejectTerms, respecting terminateOnReject.      This prevents either party from being held in limbo indefinitely.

params.workerAddr: Worker wallet address whose proposal has expired.

proposeMigration(address).details: Only the registered worker (msg.sender) can initiate. Stores the      proposed new address as a pending migration. The new address must      separately call acceptMigration() to prove control and complete transfer.

params.newAddress: The destination address that will receive full worker state.

proposeTerms(address,uint8,uint256,uint2.details: Settles current earnings via _accrue(), pauses the worker, and stores the      proposal with an expiry deadline. Worker must accept or reject before expiry.      Rate and interval are the core employment terms — workers must consent to changes.

params.amountPerIntervalWei: Proposed new payment amount in wei per interval.
params.customIntervalSeconds: Custom interval — only used when timeline is Custom.
params.terminateOnReject: If true, rejection or expiry triggers full settlement and termination.

rejectTerms().details: If terminateOnReject=true: fractional settlement is applied, worker is permanently      deactivated, accrued balance remains claimable. If terminateOnReject=false: old      terms are restored and worker resumes. In both cases lastAccruedAt is reset to now      because _accrue() was called at proposeTerms time — no remainder has accumulated      since the worker was paused throughout the proposal period.

setLowTreasuryThreshold(uint256).details: Only callable by owner. Set to 0 to disable low treasury warnings.

setProposalWindow(uint256).details: Operator-settable at runtime. Only affects proposals made after this call.

treasuryRunway().details: Pure view — safe to call permissionlessly by any worker or frontend at zero gas cost.      Skips inactive workers and Trigger-timeline workers since they do not continuously drain.

returns.estimatedRunwaySeconds: How many seconds the current treasury balance can sustain payroll.         Returns type(uint256).max if no workers are actively accruing (division by zero guard).
returns.totalRatePerSecond: Sum of all active workers' wei drain per second.

updateWorkerInterval(address,uint8,uint2.details: This is the sensitive update path. Steps:      1. _accrue() settles all complete intervals under the old terms.      2. Fractional settlement pays out the partial interval pro-rata under the old rate.      3. lastAccruedAt is reset to now — safe because every earned second is settled.      4. New timeline and intervalSeconds are applied clean from this point forward.      Fractional settlement is skipped if worker is inactive, on Trigger timeline,      or if the interval is not actually changing.

params.customIntervalSeconds: Custom interval duration — only used when timeline is Custom.

updateWorkerMetadata(address,string).details: Pure metadata change — no accrual state is touched.

updateWorkerRate(address,uint256).details: Settles whole intervals via _accrue() first. lastAccruedAt is intentionally      not touched — the interval is unchanged so _accrue() already preserved the      remainder correctly and the new rate takes effect from the next interval boundary.

params.amountPerIntervalWei: New payment amount in wei per interval.

withdrawExcess(address,uint256).details: Steps: (1) accrue all active non-Trigger workers to settle pending earnings so the      balance check reflects reality, (2) compute total drain rate and minimum reserve,      (3) revert if treasury is already underwater or withdrawal would breach the reserve,      (4) transfer and emit. Callable by operators only.

params.recipient: Address to receive the withdrawn ETH.

workerRunway(address).details: A worker's fair share of the balance is proportional to what fraction of the total      drain rate they represent. This gives a personally meaningful runway figure rather      than a global one that ignores how many other workers are competing for the same funds.

returns.estimatedRunwaySeconds: Seconds of funding remaining for this specific worker.         Returns 0 if worker does not exist, is inactive, or is on Trigger timeline.         Returns type(uint256).max if worker is active but total drain rate is zero.

acceptMigration(address).notice: Step 2 — Proposed new address accepts the migration.

addWorker(address,uint8,uint256,uint256,.notice: Registers a new worker payroll profile.

admins(address).notice: Operator addresses allowed to manage payroll workers.

cancelMigration().notice: Cancels a pending migration. Only callable by the worker who proposed it.

cancelProposal(address).notice: Operator cancels an outstanding proposal and restores the worker.

claim().notice: Claims caller worker's available earnings to caller.

claimTo(address).notice: Claims caller worker's earnings to a custom recipient.

claimable(address).notice: Returns current claimable amount for a worker.

defaultProposalWindow().notice: Proposal review window in seconds. Operator-settable. Defaults to 7 days.

expireProposal(address).notice: Expires a stale proposal after the review window has closed.

fundTreasury().notice: Funds treasury with ETH from owner/admin.

grantTriggerPayment(address,uint256).notice: Grants claimable funds for trigger-based workers.

lowTreasuryThresholdSeconds().notice: Runway threshold in seconds below which LowTreasury event is emitted.

pendingMigrations(address).notice: Pending migrations keyed by current worker address.

pendingTerms(address).notice: Pending term proposals keyed by worker address.

proposeMigration(address).notice: Step 1 — Current worker proposes migration to a new address.

proposeTerms(address,uint8,uint256,uint2.notice: Operator proposes new payroll terms for a worker.

setAdmin(address,bool).notice: Enables or disables an admin operator.

setLowTreasuryThreshold(uint256).notice: Updates the runway threshold below which LowTreasury events are emitted.

setProposalWindow(uint256).notice: Sets the review window duration for future term proposals.

transferOwnership(address).notice: Transfers ownership to a new address.

treasuryRunway().notice: Returns the aggregate drain rate and estimated treasury runway across all active workers.

updateWorkerInterval(address,uint8,uint2.notice: Updates the worker's timeline type and interval duration.

updateWorkerMetadata(address,string).notice: Updates only the worker's offchain metadata.

updateWorkerRate(address,uint256).notice: Updates only the worker's pay rate per interval.

withdrawExcess(address,uint256).notice: Withdraws excess treasury funds that exceed the one-hour minimum payroll reserve.

workerList(uint256).notice: Ordered list of all registered worker addresses for iteration.

workerRunway(address).notice: Returns a specific worker's proportional runway given their share of the treasury drain.

workers(address).notice: Worker registry and payroll state keyed by worker address.
